#  Add Punch List Items to a Drawing (iOS) 
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * _To add_ _punch list_ _items to a drawing:_ * 'Read Only' permission or higher level permissions on the project's Drawings tool.  
AND* 'Standard' or 'Admin' level permissions on the project's Punch List tool.  
_Note_ : While 'Standard' level users can create punch list items, they cannot assign a punch item unless they have been granted special permission to act as the Punch Item Manager.
    * _To publish punch list item markups on a drawing:_ * 'Standard' or 'Admin' level permissions on the project's Drawings tool. See [What is the difference between personal and published drawing markups?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-is-the-difference-between-personal-and-published-drawing-markups)


##  Steps 
  1. Open the **Procore** app on your iOS mobile device.
  2. Tap the project's **Drawings** tool.
  3. Tap the drawing you want to add a punch list item to.
  4. Tap the **Pin**
  5. Tap the **Punch** ![Icon Drawing Markup Punch Ios](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/42eb468c6514bb9673111cad9088f067/ca7c67342128ec50c98c9c06443476f8/icon-drawing-markup-punch-ios.png?fm=webp&h=18) icon.
  6. Place a punch item pin on the drawing by tapping the area where you want the item to appear.
  7. After the punch item has been placed, choose from the following options:
     * To link an existing item:
       * Tap **Link Existing** to select an existing punch to add.
       * Select the item to add it to the pin.
     * To create a new punch item:
       * Select a template or tap **+ Create Punch Without a Template**.
       * Enter any relevant information needed. See [Create a Punch List Item (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/punch-list-ios/tutorials/create-a-punch-list-item-ios)
       * Tap **Save**.
  8. The punch pin displays the number assigned to the punch list item.  
_Note:_ Gray punch pin icons denote a closed punch list item. Orange punch pin items denote an open punch item.
  9. If you have 'Standard' or 'Admin' permissions to the Drawings tool and want to publish the punch markup:
    1. Tap the Select markup tool.
    2. Tap the punch pin and tap **Publish**.  
_Note:_ If you want Procore to automatically publish any new punch list items you add to drawings in this project, set 'Auto-Publish Punch Pins' to ON.


## See Also
  * [Mark Up a Drawing (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-ios/tutorials/mark-up-a-drawing-ios)
  * [Drawings (iOS) - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-ios/permissions)
  * [Create Punch List Items with Quick Capture from a Drawing (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-ios/tutorials/create-punch-list-items-with-quick-capture-from-a-drawing-ios)

description: How to add punch list items to drawings on the Procore iOS app.
